attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00039, derived from source AUC-039) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-SURG-01 bucket; SURG used as the closest fit for major multi-system trauma given no dedicated TRAUMA specialty tag exists in the schema.

This is a bystander/witness-reported case with an unconscious patient at a motor vehicle collision scene; almost all history came via a third party, and demographics/social history are largely unknown — disclosure_gate values set to volunteered_unprompted for bystander-volunteered facts, as no dedicated third-party gate exists in the schema.

Source note describes in-person jaw thrust/c-spine control, direct pressure, improvised pelvic binder application, and upgraded HEMS/ICP dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telephone contact per protocol reprojection rules, before the clinician's own physical intervention.
Vitals, GCS, and detailed trauma examination findings (chest, pelvis) were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.
Patient demographics (age, sex) inferred loosely from source context as a conservative placeholder; true identity/history unknown at the scene per the bystander-reported nature of this case.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
